parameters.query:
SELECT
  d.id AS deal_id,
  d.stage,
  d.property_price,
  d.asking_price,
  d.days_on_market,
  d.vendor_last_contacted,
  d.probability,
  p.id AS property_id,
  p.title AS property_title,
  p.address,
  p.zone,
  p.tipologia,
  p.area_m2,
  p.price_per_m2,
  p.price_previous,
  p.listing_url,
  c.id AS contact_id,
  c.full_name AS vendor_name,
  c.email AS vendor_email,
  c.phone AS vendor_phone,
  c.language_detected AS vendor_language,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activities a
    WHERE a.contact_id = c.id
      AND a.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  ) AS activities_last_7d,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activities a
    WHERE a.contact_id = c.id
      AND a.type = 'visit'
      AND a.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  ) AS visits_last_7d,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activities a
    WHERE a.contact_id = c.id
      AND a.type IN ('inquiry', 'lead_contact')
      AND a.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  ) AS inquiries_last_7d,
  (
    SELECT AVG(COALESCE((a.metadata->>'interest_level')::numeric, 3))
    FROM activities a
    WHERE a.contact_id = c.id
      AND a.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  ) AS avg_interest_level
FROM deals d
JOIN properties p ON p.id = d.property_id
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = d.vendor_contact_id
WHERE d.status = 'active'
  AND d.vendor_contact_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.property_price DESC

parameters.values: ={{ $json.contact_id }},vendor_report_sent,Relatório semanal de vendedor enviado (Workflow E),={{ JSON.stringify({deal_id: $json.deal_id, property_id: $json.property_id, report_date: $json.report_date, visits: $json.metrics.visits_count, inquiries: $json.metrics.inquiries_received}) }},={{ new Date().toISOString() }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO market_snapshots (deal_id, property_id, snapshot_date, days_on_market, price, price_per_m2, visits_count, inquiries_count, avg_interest_level, activity_trend, price_position_pct, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.deal_id }}',
  '{{ $json.property_id }}',
  '{{ $json.report_date }}',
  {{ $json.metrics.days_on_market }},
  {{ $json.property_price }},
  {{ $json.metrics.price_per_m2 }},
  {{ $json.metrics.visits_count }},
  {{ $json.metrics.inquiries_received }},
  {{ $json.metrics.avg_interest_level }},
  '{{ $json.metrics.activity_trend }}',
  {{ $json.metrics.price_position_pct }},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (property_id, snapshot_date) DO UPDATE SET
  days_on_market = EXCLUDED.days_on_market,
  visits_count = EXCLUDED.visits_count,
  inquiries_count = EXCLUDED.inquiries_count,
  activity_trend = EXCLUDED.activity_trend;
UPDATE deals SET vendor_last_contacted = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.deal_id }}'

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { reports_sent: 0, deals_processed: [], status: 'no_active_deals', message: 'Nenhum deal activo com vendedor encontrado' } }];
